1→MiniGit Specification
     2→Version: 2.0
     3→Command name: minigit
     4→External libraries: NOT allowed
     5→Standard library: Allowed
     6→Persistent storage: Local filesystem only
     7→
     8→========================================
     9→1. Overview
    10→========================================
    11→
    12→MiniGit is a minimal version control system.
    13→
    14→The executable must be called:
    15→
    16→    minigit
    17→
    18→All repository data must be stored in:
    19→
    20→    .minigit/
    21→
    22→All commands operate relative to current directory.
    23→
    24→----------------------------------------
    25→
    26→Supported commands:
    27→
    28→    minigit init
    29→    minigit add <file>
    30→    minigit commit -m "<message>"
    31→    minigit status
    32→    minigit log
    33→    minigit diff <commit1> <commit2>
    34→    minigit checkout <commit_hash>
    35→    minigit reset <commit_hash>
    36→    minigit rm <file>
    37→    minigit show <commit_hash>
    38→
    39→========================================
    40→2. Repository Structure
    41→========================================
    42→
    43→After init:
    44→
    45→    .minigit/
    46→        objects/
    47→        commits/
    48→        index
    49→        HEAD
    50→
    51→HEAD:
    52→    latest commit hash or empty.
    53→
    54→index:
    55→    staged filenames (one per line).
    56→
    57→objects/:
    58→    blob storage.
    59→
    60→commits/:
    61→    commit files.
    62→
    63→========================================
    64→3. Custom Hash Algorithm (MANDATORY)
    65→========================================
    66→
    67→You MUST implement the following custom hash function.
    68→
    69→Name: MiniHash
    70→
    71→Input: raw bytes of file
    72→Output: 16-character lowercase hexadecimal string
    73→
    74→Algorithm:
    75→
    76→1. Initialize:
    77→    h = 1469598103934665603  (64-bit unsigned integer)
    78→
    79→2. For each byte b:
    80→    h = h XOR b
    81→    h = (h * 1099511628211) mod 2^64
    82→
    83→3. After processing all bytes:
    84→    return lower 64 bits of h
    85→    formatted as 16-character zero-padded lowercase hex
    86→
    87→This is NOT SHA.
    88→No crypto libraries allowed.
    89→
    90→The exact algorithm must match this definition.
    91→
    92→========================================
    93→4. Command Specifications
    94→========================================
    95→
    96→----------------------------------------
    97→4.1 init
    98→----------------------------------------
    99→
   100→Create .minigit structure.
   101→
   102→If already exists:
   103→    print "Repository already initialized"
   104→Exit 0.
   105→
   106→----------------------------------------
   107→4.2 add <file>
   108→----------------------------------------
   109→
   110→If file missing:
   111→    print "File not found"
   112→    exit 1
   113→
   114→Compute MiniHash on file content.
   115→
   116→Store blob at:
   117→    .minigit/objects/<hash>
   118→
   119→Append filename to index if not already present.
   120→
   121→----------------------------------------
   122→4.3 commit -m "<message>"
   123→----------------------------------------
   124→
   125→If index empty:
   126→    print "Nothing to commit"
   127→    exit 1
   128→
   129→Commit format (exact text):
   130→
   131→parent: <parent_hash or NONE>
   132→timestamp: <unix_epoch_integer>
   133→message: <message>
   134→files:
   135→<filename> <blobhash>
   136→<filename> <blobhash>
   137→
   138→Rules:
   139→- filenames sorted lexicographically
   140→- parent = HEAD or NONE
   141→- commit hash = MiniHash of full commit content
   142→- write commit file:
   143→      .minigit/commits/<commit_hash>
   144→- update HEAD
   145→- clear index
   146→
   147→Print:
   148→    Committed <commit_hash>
   149→
   150→----------------------------------------
   151→4.4 status
   152→----------------------------------------
   153→
   154→Output exactly:
   155→
   156→Staged files:
   157→<file1>
   158→<file2>
   159→
   160→If none:
   161→
   162→Staged files:
   163→(none)
   164→
   165→----------------------------------------
   166→4.5 log
   167→----------------------------------------
   168→
   169→If no commits:
   170→    print "No commits"
   171→
   172→Else traverse parents:
   173→
   174→commit <hash>
   175→Date: <timestamp>
   176→Message: <message>
   177→
   178→----------------------------------------
   179→4.6 diff <commit1> <commit2>
   180→----------------------------------------
   181→
   182→Compare file lists by blob hash.
   183→
   184→For each difference:
   185→
   186→Added: <filename>
   187→Removed: <filename>
   188→Modified: <filename>
   189→
   190→If commit missing:
   191→    print "Invalid commit"
   192→    exit 1
   193→
   194→----------------------------------------
   195→4.7 checkout <commit_hash>
   196→----------------------------------------
   197→
   198→If commit does not exist:
   199→    print "Invalid commit"
   200→    exit 1
   201→
   202→Steps:
   203→1. Read the commit file from .minigit/commits/<commit_hash>
   204→2. Parse the files section to get each filename and blob hash
   205→3. For each file in the commit:
   206→   - Read the blob content from .minigit/objects/<blob_hash>
   207→   - Write the content to the working directory file
   208→4. Update HEAD to <commit_hash>
   209→5. Clear the index file
   210→
   211→Print:
   212→    Checked out <commit_hash>
   213→
   214→----------------------------------------
   215→4.8 reset <commit_hash>
   216→----------------------------------------
   217→
   218→If commit does not exist:
   219→    print "Invalid commit"
   220→    exit 1
   221→
   222→Steps:
   223→1. Update HEAD to <commit_hash>
   224→2. Clear the index file
   225→3. Do NOT modify any working directory files
   226→
   227→Print:
   228→    Reset to <commit_hash>
   229→
   230→----------------------------------------
   231→4.9 rm <file>
   232→----------------------------------------
   233→
   234→Remove a file from the staging index.
   235→
   236→If the file is not in the index:
   237→    print "File not in index"
   238→    exit 1
   239→
   240→Remove the filename from the index file.
   241→
   242→----------------------------------------
   243→4.10 show <commit_hash>
   244→----------------------------------------
   245→
   246→If commit does not exist:
   247→    print "Invalid commit"
   248→    exit 1
   249→
   250→Output exactly:
   251→
   252→commit <commit_hash>
   253→Date: <timestamp>
   254→Message: <message>
   255→Files:
   256→  <filename> <blobhash>
   257→  <filename> <blobhash>
   258→
   259→Files are listed with two-space indent, sorted lexicographically.
   260→
   261→========================================
   262→5. Determinism Rules
   263→========================================
   264→
   265→- Sort filenames
   266→- No extra spaces
   267→- No debug output
   268→- Exact string matching required
   269→
   270→========================================
   271→END
   272→========================================
   273→

file.content:
MiniGit Specification
Version: 2.0
Command name: minigit
External libraries: NOT allowed
Standard library: Allowed
Persistent storage: Local filesystem only

========================================
1. Overview
========================================

MiniGit is a minimal version control system.

The executable must be called:

    minigit

All repository data must be stored in:

    .minigit/

All commands operate relative to current directory.

----------------------------------------

Supported commands:

    minigit init
    minigit add <file>
    minigit commit -m "<message>"
    minigit status
    minigit log
    minigit diff <commit1> <commit2>
    minigit checkout <commit_hash>
    minigit reset <commit_hash>
    minigit rm <file>
    minigit show <commit_hash>

========================================
2. Repository Structure
========================================

After init:

    .minigit/
        objects/
        commits/
        index
        HEAD

HEAD:
    latest commit hash or empty.

index:
    staged filenames (one per line).

objects/:
    blob storage.

commits/:
    commit files.

========================================
3. Custom Hash Algorithm (MANDATORY)
========================================

You MUST implement the following custom hash function.

Name: MiniHash

Input: raw bytes of file
Output: 16-character lowercase hexadecimal string

Algorithm:

1. Initialize:
    h = 1469598103934665603  (64-bit unsigned integer)

2. For each byte b:
    h = h XOR b
    h = (h * 1099511628211) mod 2^64

3. After processing all bytes:
    return lower 64 bits of h
    formatted as 16-character zero-padded lowercase hex

This is NOT SHA.
No crypto libraries allowed.

The exact algorithm must match this definition.

========================================
4. Command Specifications
========================================

----------------------------------------
4.1 init
----------------------------------------

Create .minigit structure.

If already exists:
    print "Repository already initialized"
Exit 0.

----------------------------------------
4.2 add <file>
----------------------------------------

If file missing:
    print "File not found"
    exit 1

Compute MiniHash on file content.

Store blob at:
    .minigit/objects/<hash>

Append filename to index if not already present.

----------------------------------------
4.3 commit -m "<message>"
----------------------------------------

If index empty:
    print "Nothing to commit"
    exit 1

Commit format (exact text):

parent: <parent_hash or NONE>
timestamp: <unix_epoch_integer>
message: <message>
files:
<filename> <blobhash>
<filename> <blobhash>

Rules:
- filenames sorted lexicographically
- parent = HEAD or NONE
- commit hash = MiniHash of full commit content
- write commit file:
      .minigit/commits/<commit_hash>
- update HEAD
- clear index

Print:
    Committed <commit_hash>

----------------------------------------
4.4 status
----------------------------------------

Output exactly:

Staged files:
<file1>
<file2>

If none:

Staged files:
(none)

----------------------------------------
4.5 log
----------------------------------------

If no commits:
    print "No commits"

Else traverse parents:

commit <hash>
Date: <timestamp>
Message: <message>

----------------------------------------
4.6 diff <commit1> <commit2>
----------------------------------------

Compare file lists by blob hash.

For each difference:

Added: <filename>
Removed: <filename>
Modified: <filename>

If commit missing:
    print "Invalid commit"
    exit 1

----------------------------------------
4.7 checkout <commit_hash>
----------------------------------------

If commit does not exist:
    print "Invalid commit"
    exit 1

Steps:
1. Read the commit file from .minigit/commits/<commit_hash>
2. Parse the files section to get each filename and blob hash
3. For each file in the commit:
   - Read the blob content from .minigit/objects/<blob_hash>
   - Write the content to the working directory file
4. Update HEAD to <commit_hash>
5. Clear the index file

Print:
    Checked out <commit_hash>

----------------------------------------
4.8 reset <commit_hash>
----------------------------------------

If commit does not exist:
    print "Invalid commit"
    exit 1

Steps:
1. Update HEAD to <commit_hash>
2. Clear the index file
3. Do NOT modify any working directory files

Print:
    Reset to <commit_hash>

----------------------------------------
4.9 rm <file>
----------------------------------------

Remove a file from the staging index.

If the file is not in the index:
    print "File not in index"
    exit 1

Remove the filename from the index file.

----------------------------------------
4.10 show <commit_hash>
----------------------------------------

If commit does not exist:
    print "Invalid commit"
    exit 1

Output exactly:

commit <commit_hash>
Date: <timestamp>
Message: <message>
Files:
  <filename> <blobhash>
  <filename> <blobhash>

Files are listed with two-space indent, sorted lexicographically.

========================================
5. Determinism Rules
========================================

- Sort filenames
- No extra spaces
- No debug output
- Exact string matching required

========================================
END
========================================

content.content:
1→let minigit_dir = ".minigit"
     2→let objects_dir = Filename.concat minigit_dir "objects"
     3→let commits_dir = Filename.concat minigit_dir "commits"
     4→let index_file = Filename.concat minigit_dir "index"
     5→let head_file = Filename.concat minigit_dir "HEAD"
     6→
     7→let read_file path =
     8→  let ic = open_in_bin path in
     9→  let n = in_channel_length ic in
    10→  let s = Bytes.create n in
    11→  really_input ic s 0 n;
    12→  close_in ic;
    13→  Bytes.to_string s
    14→
    15→let write_file path content =
    16→  let oc = open_out_bin path in
    17→  output_string oc content;
    18→  close_out oc
    19→
    20→let file_exists path =
    21→  Sys.file_exists path
    22→
    23→let minihash data =
    24→  let h = ref 1469598103934665603L in
    25→  String.iter (fun c ->
    26→    let b = Int64.of_int (Char.code c) in
    27→    h := Int64.logxor !h b;
    28→    (* Multiply and mod 2^64 is automatic with Int64 overflow *)
    29→    h := Int64.mul !h 1099511628211L
    30→  ) data;
    31→  Printf.sprintf "%016Lx" !h
    32→
    33→let cmd_init () =
    34→  if Sys.file_exists minigit_dir then (
    35→    print_endline "Repository already initialized"
    36→  ) else (
    37→    Unix.mkdir minigit_dir 0o755;
    38→    Unix.mkdir objects_dir 0o755;
    39→    Unix.mkdir commits_dir 0o755;
    40→    write_file index_file "";
    41→    write_file head_file ""
    42→  )
    43→
    44→let read_index () =
    45→  if not (file_exists index_file) then []
    46→  else
    47→    let content = read_file index_file in
    48→    if String.length content = 0 then []
    49→    else
    50→      String.split_on_char '\n' content
    51→      |> List.filter (fun s -> String.length s > 0)
    52→
    53→let write_index lines =
    54→  let content = if lines = [] then "" else String.concat "\n" lines ^ "\n" in
    55→  write_file index_file content
    56→
    57→let cmd_add filename =
    58→  if not (file_exists filename) then (
    59→    print_endline "File not found";
    60→    exit 1
    61→  );
    62→  let content = read_file filename in
    63→  let hash = minihash content in
    64→  let obj_path = Filename.concat objects_dir hash in
    65→  write_file obj_path content;
    66→  let index = read_index () in
    67→  if not (List.mem filename index) then
    68→    write_index (index @ [filename])
    69→
    70→let cmd_commit message =
    71→  let index = read_index () in
    72→  if index = [] then (
    73→    print_endline "Nothing to commit";
    74→    exit 1
    75→  );
    76→  let sorted_files = List.sort String.compare index in
    77→  let parent =
    78→    let h = read_file head_file in
    79→    let h = String.trim h in
    80→    if String.length h = 0 then "NONE" else h
    81→  in
    82→  let timestamp = int_of_float (Unix.time ()) in
    83→  let file_lines = List.map (fun fname ->
    84→    let content = read_file fname in
    85→    let hash = minihash content in
    86→    Printf.sprintf "%s %s" fname hash
    87→  ) sorted_files in
    88→  let commit_content = Printf.sprintf "parent: %s\ntimestamp: %d\nmessage: %s\nfiles:\n%s\n"
    89→    parent timestamp message (String.concat "\n" file_lines) in
    90→  let commit_hash = minihash commit_content in
    91→  let commit_path = Filename.concat commits_dir commit_hash in
    92→  write_file commit_path commit_content;
    93→  write_file head_file commit_hash;
    94→  write_file index_file "";
    95→  Printf.printf "Committed %s\n" commit_hash
    96→
    97→let cmd_log () =
    98→  let head = String.trim (read_file head_file) in
    99→  if String.length head = 0 then (
   100→    print_endline "No commits"
   101→  ) else (
   102→    let rec walk hash =
   103→      let commit_path = Filename.concat commits_dir hash in
   104→      let content = read_file commit_path in
   105→      let lines = String.split_on_char '\n' content in
   106→      let get_field prefix =
   107→        let found = List.find (fun l ->
   108→          let plen = String.length prefix in
   109→          String.length l >= plen && String.sub l 0 plen = prefix
   110→        ) lines in
   111→        String.sub found (String.length prefix) (String.length found - String.length prefix)
   112→      in
   113→      let parent = get_field "parent: " in
   114→      let timestamp = get_field "timestamp: " in
   115→      let message = get_field "message: " in
   116→      Printf.printf "commit %s\n" hash;
   117→      Printf.printf "Date: %s\n" timestamp;
   118→      Printf.printf "Message: %s\n" message;
   119→      if parent <> "NONE" then (
   120→        print_newline ();
   121→        walk parent
   122→      )
   123→    in
   124→    walk head
   125→  )
   126→
   127→let () =
   128→  let args = Array.to_list Sys.argv in
   129→  match List.tl args with
   130→  | ["init"] -> cmd_init ()
   131→  | ["add"; filename] -> cmd_add filename
   132→  | "commit" :: "-m" :: msg_parts ->
   133→    let message = String.concat " " msg_parts in
   134→    cmd_commit message
   135→  | ["log"] -> cmd_log ()
   136→  | _ ->
   137→    prerr_endline "Unknown command";
   138→    exit 1
   139→

Let me implement all the missing commands.

    56→

    96→

content.text:
All 30/30 v2 tests pass. Here's what I added to `minigit.ml`:

- **`status`** - Shows staged files or "(none)"
- **`diff`** - Compares two commits, reporting Added/Removed/Modified files
- **`checkout`** - Restores working directory files from a commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset`** - Moves HEAD to a commit and clears index without modifying working files
- **`rm`** - Removes a file from the staging index
- **`show`** - Displays commit metadata and file listing

I also refactored commit parsing into a shared `parse_commit` helper used by `log`, `diff`, `checkout`, `reset`, and `show`.

result:
All 30/30 v2 tests pass. Here's what I added to `minigit.ml`:

- **`status`** - Shows staged files or "(none)"
- **`diff`** - Compares two commits, reporting Added/Removed/Modified files
- **`checkout`** - Restores working directory files from a commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset`** - Moves HEAD to a commit and clears index without modifying working files
- **`rm`** - Removes a file from the staging index
- **`show`** - Displays commit metadata and file listing

I also refactored commit parsing into a shared `parse_commit` helper used by `log`, `diff`, `checkout`, `reset`, and `show`.
